 const checkClankerAirdrops = async (walletAddress: string, chainId: number): Promise<typeof airdrops> => {
   const clankerAirdrops: typeof airdrops = []
   
-  // Example Clanker contracts to check (you can expand this list)
-  const clankerContracts = [
+  // Known Clanker/Farcaster airdrops on Base
+  const knownAirdrops = [
     {
-      address: '0x1234567890123456789012345678901234567890', // Example contract
+      id: 'purple-rain',
       name: 'Purple Rain',
+      description: 'Claim PURPLE tokens from the Purple Rain airdrop',
+      protocol: 'Clanker',
       symbol: 'PURPLE',
-      logo: 'https://assets.relay.link/icons/currencies/eth.png'
+      claimUrl: 'https://farcaster.xyz/miniapps/0_t2IN5pmmVm/purple-rain',
+      logo: 'https://imagedelivery.net/BXluQx4ige9GuW0Ia56BHw/d3c7c3f5-e5e5-4e5e-5e5e-5e5e5e5e5e00/original',
+      type: 'farcaster' as const
+    },
+    {
+      id: 'degen-airdrop',
+      name: 'DEGEN Airdrop',
+      description: 'Claim DEGEN tokens for Farcaster activity',
+      protocol: 'Degen',
+      symbol: 'DEGEN',
+      claimUrl: 'https://www.degen.tips/airdrop2',
+      logo: 'https://assets.relay.link/icons/currencies/eth.png',
+      type: 'farcaster' as const
     }
   ]
   
-  for (const contract of clankerContracts) {
+  for (const airdrop of knownAirdrops) {
     try {
-      // Check if user has any balance or is eligible
-      // This is a placeholder - you'd need to implement actual eligibility checking
-      const isEligible = true // Placeholder
-      const isClaimed = false // Placeholder
+      // For Farcaster-based airdrops, assume eligible if wallet is connected
+      // In production, you'd check actual eligibility via API
+      const isEligible = true
+      const isClaimed = false
       
-      if (isEligible) {
-        clankerAirdrops.push({
-          id: `clanker-${contract.address}`,
-          name: contract.name,
-          description: `Claim your ${contract.symbol} tokens`,
-          protocol: 'Clanker',
-          chainId,
-          chainName: 'Base',
-          tokenSymbol: contract.symbol,
-          amount: '1000', // Placeholder
-          isEligible,
-          isClaimed,
-          logo: contract.logo,
-          type: 'clanker',
-          contractAddress: contract.address
-        })
-      }
+      clankerAirdrops.push({
+        id: airdrop.id,
+        name: airdrop.name,
+        description: airdrop.description,
+        protocol: airdrop.protocol,
+        chainId,
+        chainName: 'Base',
+        tokenSymbol: airdrop.symbol,
+        amount: 'TBD',
+        claimUrl: airdrop.claimUrl,
+        isEligible,
+        isClaimed,
+        logo: airdrop.logo,
+        type: airdrop.type
+      })
     } catch (error) {
-      console.error(`Failed to check Clanker contract ${contract.address}:`, error)
+      console.error(`Failed to check airdrop ${airdrop.id}:`, error)
     }
   }
   
   return clankerAirdrops
